transcript: Yeah, can I get some leopard meat?
We don't have any leopard meat. We have just pork, only.
No. We just have a pork for sausage, that's all.
Do you want to, uh... maybe set some traps for some geese this weekend? Get some geese meat, or...?
[laughs] No, I don't want that, because we just use pork and the sausage, sir.
And sausage. Do you guys maybe like to nibble on any geese at all, or...?
We might throw some geese to some leopards. Check that out.
Are you kidding, or you... what's going on?
If you're, uh... if you're interested, darlin', I'll go down there with ya.
Wait a minute. [speaking to someone in background, unclear]
